pre_run_command.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_info.command_line // \"\""); case "$CMD" in grep\ *|egrep\ *|fgrep\ *|rg\ *|ag\ *|ack\ *) echo "Blocked: use iris_survey instead of shell search."; exit 2;; find\ *|fd\ *) echo "Blocked: use iris_toc instead of shell file-find."; exit 2;; esac; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "\\|\\s*(grep|rg|ag|ack)"; then echo "Blocked: do not pipe to search tools. Use iris_survey."; exit 2; fi'
